block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Facebook parent Meta Platforms officially changed its ticker to "META" to reflect its new focus on the metaverse. Since the beginning of the year, the share price has fallen by more than 40% due to litigation. Can changing the ticker fix the situation?
